Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: Did you know that Louisiana is the country's biggest producer of blue crabs? Celebrate the blue crab with Emeril's crab and corn fritters, chilled avocado soup with crab relish, and crabmeat stuffed trout with vodka butter sauce.
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: It's a pizza party! Emeril will how you how to make basic dough. Plus, Emeril shares his recipes for the ultimate mushroom and Manchego pizza and classic pizza margherita
Video.title: Making Pizza at Home

Video.summary: Emeril creates dishes with heart-healthy nutrients: Portuguese-style grilled sardines, salmon with quinoa with roasted shallot and cherry vinaigrette, and mackerel with spinach and chickpea salad
Video.title: Heart-Healthy Meals

Video.summary: Emeril shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.
Video.title: with Juwan Johnson, Chanen Johnson

Video.summary: Smoked Salmon, Poached Eggs, Grit Cakes, New Orleans Eggs, Eye Openers
Video.title: Brunch

Video.summary: Emeril welcomes Pittsburgh Steelers superfan Brad Younkin.
Video.title: Pittsburgh

Video.summary: Denver superfan Catherine Highland grills up dishes to honor Colorado.
Video.title: Denver

Video.summary: Emeril serves up tasty Easter treats with an international twist: Baklava; Frozen Strawberry Lemon-Basil Mousse; Italian Easter Pie; Russian Tea Cakes
Video.title: Irresistible Sweets

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril makes the most of figs: Goat Cheese Tart with Prosciutto and Port-Macerated Figs; Seared Duck Breasts with Spiced Fig Jam; Bucatini with Figs and Gorgonzola Sauce.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: For a Texan style tailgate, impress your guests with my take on the state's faves.
Video.title: Dallas Cowboys

Video.summary: Emeril's Frozen Milk Punch, Suzanne's Muffins, Kicked-Up Ambrosia Salad Parfaits, Apple Smoked Bacon, White Cheddar and Potato Omelet
Video.title: Summer Brunch

Video.summary: Party bites and cocktails with dips, meatballs and egg rolls.
Video.title: Happy Happy Hour

Video.summary: Grilling contest winner recipes: Laotian Grilled Pork Skewers with Papaya Salad and Sticky Rice; Grilled Eggplant Pockets; Ginger-Mango Flank Steak with Fennel Slaw; Mike's Mega Grilled Pizza
Video.title: Emeril's Grilling Contest

Video.summary: Ramos Gin Fizz; Poached Oysters in Herbsaint Cream with Black Pepper Creme Fraiche, Caviar, and Spinach; Baby Lamb Chops with Rosemary-Parmesan Crust; Fig and Balsamic Syrup Mille-Feuille
Video.title: Emeril's Good Company

Video.summary: Dandelion and Bitter Greens with Warm Bacon Dressing, Pennsylvania Dutch Corn Chowder, Ham and Apple Dump
Video.title: Pennsylvania Dutch Cooking

Video.summary: Emeril shows the most useful kitchen equipment: quick and easy stir-fried squid with chili sauce and sirloin steak fajitas
Video.title: Which Pan is for What?

Video.summary: Embrace autumn with Emeril's sweet and savory apple recipes.
Video.title: Amazing Apples

Video.summary: It's a chocolate celebration when Emeril makes his ultimate triple chocolate cake: moist chocolate cake layered with chocolate mousse and topped with dark chocolate ganache
Video.title: Chocolate Indulgences

Video.summary: Emeril and Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter prepare classic down-home dishes.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: Couscous Jambalaya, Dirty Quinoa
Video.title: Couscous

Video.summary: Cheesesteak Po Boy, Oyster Po Boy
Video.title: Po Boys

Video.summary: Grillade Stuffed Quail, Andouille-Cheese Grit Cakes
Video.title: Quail

Video.summary: Milk Punch and Mint Julep, Duck Confit Potato Pancake with Poached Eggs, Wild and Exotic Hollandaise
Video.title: Funky Brunch

Video.summary: Cowboy Caviar, Fried Potatoes with Poblano Pepper Strips, Scrambled Eggs with Fresh Oysters and Chilies, Bloody Mary's
Video.title: Chilis

Video.summary: Minneapolis Vikings fans Jim Dazzle and Brandie Pac.
Video.title: Minneapolis

Video.summary: A 49ers superfan helps cook up some crowd-pleasing Bay Area seafood dishes.
Video.title: San Francisco

Video.summary: Miami Dolphins superfan Seth Farmer and Julia Thompson inspire Emeril's tailgating creations.
Video.title: Miami

Video.summary: Emeril joins Cleveland Browns superfan Ray Prisby for game-day dishes.
Video.title: Cleveland

Video.summary: Chicago Bears fan Edgar Mejia puts a New Orleans spin on Chicago-style hotdogs and deep dish pizza.
Video.title: Chicago

Video.summary: For a New York style tailgate, keep it old school with Emeril's favorite deli inspired classics.
Video.title: New York Giants
